config_use_rule: Use as transformed pattern guidance only; do not copy claims, real-person visuals, or copyrighted clips.

hook_patterns.first_1s: show the named public actor or institution in text, not necessarily face
hook_patterns.first_3s: attach one conflict verb or claim boundary

hook_patterns.first_1s: lead with a number, amount, date, or count
hook_patterns.first_3s: identify what the number refers to
hook_patterns.first_5s: show source card or calculation caveat

hook_patterns.first_1s: display a short quote or contradiction
show courthouse, assembly, newsroom, document desk, or street-speech scene
hook_patterns.first_3s: label the institution or public consequence
